proof:
intro h
  have h_mod7 : 4 * x^3 ≡ 2003 [ZMOD 7] := by rw [sub_eq_zero.1 h]; ring
  have h2003_mod7 : 2003 % 7 = 1 := by norm_num
  rw [← Int.modEq_comm, h2003_mod7] at h_mod7
  have x_cube_mod7 : x^3 % 7 = 2 := by
    have := (Int.modEq_zero_iff.2 (dvd_mul_right 4 _)).symm.add_right 2
    simpa [show (4 * x^3) % 7 = (4 * (x^3 % 7)) % 7 by ring] using h_mod7
  have := Fin.cycleRange 7 x
  fin_cases x % 7 <;> norm_num [pow_succ'] at x_cube_mod7
